title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: Can Antonelli finally end Italy’s long title drought?
items.content: F1 Hall of Famour journalist looks back at Italy's last World Champion – and whether Kimi Antonelli could be the next.
items.contentSnippet: F1 Hall of Famour journalist looks back at Italy's last World Champion – and whether Kimi Antonelli could be the next.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: The best F1 films and TV shows to watch during April
items.content: There have been plenty of F1-themed movies and TV shows, perfect for the racing gap in April – here are some of the best.
items.contentSnippet: There have been plenty of F1-themed movies and TV shows, perfect for the racing gap in April – here are some of the best.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Weird stats from the first three rounds of 2026 so far
items.content: The 2026 F1 season is three rounds old, with the drivers having contested the Australian, Chinese and Japanese Grands Prix, with one Sprint thrown in for good measure. But while there have been plenty of overtakes, a few shocks and one very young Championship leader, there have also been some truly strange stats thrown up – not least by said leader, Kimi Antonelli…
items.contentSnippet: The 2026 F1 season is three rounds old, with the drivers having contested the Australian, Chinese and Japanese Grands Prix, with one Sprint thrown in for good measure. But while there have been plenty of overtakes, a few shocks and one very young Championship leader, there have also been some truly strange stats thrown up – not least by said leader, Kimi Antonelli…
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 2026年F1赛季前三站比赛（澳大利亚、中国和日本大奖赛）已结束，其中包括一场冲刺赛。尽管比赛出现大量超车、意外冷门，以及一位非常年轻的车手成为锦标赛领跑者，但其中一些统计数据十分奇特。特别是领跑者Kimi Antonelli的相关数据引人注目。

items.title: Ocon gambling on luck boost in Haas team battle
items.content: Ocon has picked up one point so far this season, but there is an argument that he deserves far more.
items.contentSnippet: Ocon has picked up one point so far this season, but there is an argument that he deserves far more.

items.title: Hamilton on getting his mojo back in 2026
items.content: F1.com's Lawrence Barretto speaks to Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton, with the seven-time World Champion's form in 2026 suggesting he is very much back on song.
items.contentSnippet: F1.com's Lawrence Barretto speaks to Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton, with the seven-time World Champion's form in 2026 suggesting he is very much back on song.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 七届世界冠军勒克莱尔在2026年的表现显示他状态回升。F1.com的劳伦斯·巴雷托采访了法拉利的勒克莱尔，其近期表现表明他已找回最佳状态。

items.title: 11 ways for fans to get their F1 fix during April
items.content: Here are 11 ways to keep your Formula 1 passion burning until the lights go out in Miami.
items.contentSnippet: Here are 11 ways to keep your Formula 1 passion burning until the lights go out in Miami.

items.summary: 文章介绍了11种方法，帮助赛车迷在迈阿密大奖赛结束前保持对F1的热情。

items.title: Gasly consistency sparking Alpine betting boost
items.content: Three races down and Gasly has picked up points in every one this season.

items.title: Our writers reflect on the first three rounds of 2026
items.content: With a few weeks to go until the next round on the calendar, we asked our writers to give us their take on how the 2026 season has unfolded so far – and who has the most work to do when the campaign resumes…

items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: 10 of the most striking one-off liveries in recent F1 history
items.content: Haas and Racing Bulls caught the eye at Suzuka last weekend with a couple of creative one-off liveries – the former introducing the iconic Godzilla monster to the F1 world and the latter taking inspiration from Japanese shodo calligraphy.
items.contentSnippet: Haas and Racing Bulls caught the eye at Suzuka last weekend with a couple of creative one-off liveries – the former introducing the iconic Godzilla monster to the F1 world and the latter taking inspiration from Japanese shodo calligraphy.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 在最近的F1历史中，Haas和Racing Bulls在铃鹿站分别推出了两款引人注目的特别涂装。Haas将标志性的“哥斯拉”怪物引入F1，而Racing Bulls则从日本书法中汲取灵感。这些独特的涂装在比赛中脱颖而出，展现了车队们的创意。

items.title: Stella on where McLaren need to improve after Japan
items.content: McLaren Team Principal Andrea Stella has set out the factors that he believes helped the squad to “stay in the race” in Japan, with the Italian admitting that there is one particular area where the team “have to improve”.
items.contentSnippet: McLaren Team Principal Andrea Stella has set out the factors that he believes helped the squad to “stay in the race” in Japan, with the Italian admitting that there is one particular area where the team “have to improve”.
items.creator: Formula 1
